must_fix_items.summary: Clarify that manuscript h_{i,j} uses i as transmitter and j as receiver, while implementation tuples are ordered receiver/transmitter.
must_fix_items.recommended_action: Add explicit index/sign convention sentence near the measurement model.

must_fix_items.summary: Mixed LOS/NLOS section assumes contiguous DL rows then SL rows, but h(theta) as defined interleaves SL and DL by receiving UE.
must_fix_items.recommended_action: Use abstract DL/SL row index sets or reorder h(theta)/z consistently.

must_fix_items.summary: Gaussian FIM omits covariance-derivative trace terms.
must_fix_items.recommended_action: State R_z and sigmas are known/fixed range-domain inputs independent of theta for the FIM.
Add PEB and clock standard-deviation extraction formulas, clock group, reference exclusion, units, and rank condition.

must_fix_items.summary: Finite CRLB claims require full-rank gauged FIM or explicit estimable-subspace treatment.

should_fix_items.summary: R_z=Cov(z)=E{n n^T} is only generally true for zero-mean noise.
should_fix_items.recommended_action: Use Cov(n) generally and reserve E{n n^T} equality for zero-mean LOS Gaussian noise.

should_fix_items.summary: NLOS score-covariance FIM needs regularity/support assumptions.
should_fix_items.recommended_action: Add a sentence listing valid density, finite score covariance, support, and independence assumptions.

should_fix_items.summary: Directed reciprocal sidelinks are counted separately.
should_fix_items.recommended_action: State the conditional independence assumption or allow non-diagonal V.

should_fix_items.summary: Satellite positions are treated as known and not estimated.
should_fix_items.recommended_action: State ephemeris uncertainty is neglected or external to the bound.

notable_caveats: OTDOA_RFAP supports RFAP error modeling but not direct NTN/PRS applicability without adaptation.
3GPP TS 36.211 supports LTE/E-UTRA physical channels; NR-specific PRS claims may need an NR citation.
EmeDhiBue:TIT25 supports LEO localization FI context but not JCLS clock-gauge derivation.

tests.command: python -m unittest tests.test_measurements tests.test_jacobian tests.test_fim tests.test_bounds tests.test_metrics tests.test_ordered_link_units

recommended_next_action: Patch manuscript theory text for measurement indexing/sign, mixed row sets, fixed covariance assumptions, NLOS regularity, and CRLB extraction before resubmission.
